scripts.dev: node -e "const {spawn}=require('child_process');const code=String.raw`const http=require('http');const {exec}=require('child_process');const url='http://localhost:3000/';const open=()=>{const p=process.platform;const cmd=p==='win32'?('cmd /c start \"\" '+url):p==='darwin'?('open '+url):('xdg-open '+url);exec(cmd);};const ping=()=>{http.get(url,res=>{res.resume();open();process.exit(0);}).on('error',()=>setTimeout(ping,500));};setTimeout(ping,800);`;const child=spawn(process.execPath,['-e',code],{detached:true,stdio:'ignore'});child.unref();" && next dev
